top_signals.title: Reading through the Lines of the FY2027 NDAA
top_signals.summary:
The relationship between Congress and the Pentagon over the past year has been marked by public disagreements and frustrations over lawmakers’ concerns about the Iran War, and by what some lawmakers view as politically motivated firings of top military leaders. In many ways, the House and Senate versions of the Fiscal Year 2027 National Defense Authorization Act reflect lawmakers’ efforts to check the Pentagon’s policy power.Innovation efforts are generally a bright spot in these political battles. While the reforms proposed this year across the chambers were more modest than last year’s transformational SPEED and FoRGED Acts, lawmakers continue to advance

The post Reading through the Lines of the FY2027 NDAA appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jonathan Reynolds set to oversee beefed-up business department
top_signals.summary: Incoming prime minister Andy Burnham discussing plans to give ministry more powers over science and energy policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: BASF Seeks Banks to Lead IPO of €20 Billion Agrichemical Unit
top_signals.summary: BASF SE has invited banks to pitch for roles on an initial public offering of its agrichemical division in Frankfurt, in what could be one of the largest offerings the bourse has seen in recent years.

top_signals.title: Japan passes bill to prevent unauthorized overseas crop sales
top_signals.summary: The bill aims to better protect the rights related to Japan-developed fruits that are popular overseas and prevent a loss of profit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc labels Mercedes as favorite for Belgian Grand Prix
top_signals.summary: Mercedes has won five of the seven races.
